claims.summary: High-pressure Recess can accumulate sedimentation or repetitive idle texture.
claims.disposition: verify density mitigation, sedimentation review, and resonance-anchor routes remain non-control evidence

claims.summary: Pure Recess should deny SEARCH unless explicit permission exists.
claims.disposition: verify the narrower authority contract: ordinary local read-only research remains sovereign, while budgeted experiments and live actions stay gated

claims.summary: Pressure above the resonance-anchor threshold could automatically force a transition out of Recess.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Tier 5 autonomy, pressure, and behavior-unlock wait
